brand.name: CN111 Studio
contact.hero.title: Contact
contact.hero.lede: Share your project type, goal, budget range, and timeline—we’ll reply within 1–2 business days.
contact.intro.title: Share your context. We’ll propose the next step.
contact.intro.body: We’ll clarify goals and constraints (budget/timeline/resources), then provide actionable suggestions and an initial assessment.
contact.firstCall.title: What you’ll get from the first call
contact.firstCall.items.1.title: A quick diagnosis checklist
contact.firstCall.items.1.body: Key issues and opportunities across website conversion, growth, or AI delivery—reusable for internal alignment.
contact.firstCall.items.2.title: A draft plan & roadmap
contact.firstCall.items.2.body: 1–2 delivery paths with milestones and risk notes.
contact.firstCall.items.3.title: Rough timeline & budget range
contact.firstCall.items.3.body: An initial estimate based on your inputs, plus what we need next to refine it.
contact.form.title: Inquiry form
contact.form.lede: The more context you provide, the more actionable our reply will be.
contact.form.fields.projectType.label: Project type
contact.form.fields.goal.label: Goal
contact.form.fields.goal.placeholder: What outcome are you targeting? e.g. improve signup conversion, grow organic traffic, ship an MVP in 4–8 weeks…
contact.form.fields.budgetRange.label: Budget range
contact.form.fields.timeline.label: Timeline
contact.form.fields.contactEmail.label: Email
contact.form.fields.contactPhone.label: Phone
contact.form.validation.contactRequired: Please provide at least an email or phone number.
contact.form.status.ok: Thanks—your inquiry has been received. We’ll get back to you soon.
contact.form.status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
lang.label: Language
v1.section.placeholderBody: This is a V1 information architecture skeleton. Content will be filled in future iterations.
v1.home.heroA.title: End-to-end delivery for global growth and AI products
v1.home.heroA.lede: From high-converting websites and SEO/GEO growth systems to AI MVPs, RAG, and agent workflows—ship fast and iterate sustainably.
v1.home.entrySection.title: Choose an entry
v1.home.entry.growth.title: B · Growth
v1.home.entry.growth.body: For growth outcomes: strategy breakdown, experiment design, data loops, and execution.
v1.home.entry.ai.title: C · AI
v1.home.entry.ai.body: For AI delivery: evaluation, engineering, delivery, and continuous improvement.
v1.home.proof.1.label: From kickoff to production-ready
v1.home.proof.2.label: Strategy × design × engineering
v1.home.proof.3.label: Data loops + continuous optimization
v1.home.capabilities.title: Capabilities
v1.home.capabilities.lede: We translate “global growth + AI delivery” into shippable packages—clear scope, milestones, and acceptance criteria for fast iteration.
v1.home.solutions.title: Solutions
v1.solutions.s1.title: Global website & landing growth
v1.solutions.s1.body: Information architecture, UI, engineering, tracking, and conversion optimization—turn your site into a growth engine.
v1.solutions.s2.title: SEO / GEO growth system
v1.solutions.s2.body: Technical SEO + content matrix + structured data to improve organic traffic and AI search visibility.
v1.solutions.s3.title: AI MVP delivery
v1.solutions.s3.body: From PoC to MVP: scope, prototyping, production engineering, and iteration.
v1.solutions.s4.title: AI + ops automation
v1.solutions.s4.body: Agent/workflow automation for leads, support, content, and reporting—improve efficiency and ROI.
v1.home.cases.title: Featured work (sample)
v1.home.cases.1.title: Website rebuild for global launch
v1.home.cases.1.body: Rebuilt structure and messaging, shipped tracking and performance foundations.
v1.home.cases.2.title: SEO/GEO content system
v1.home.cases.2.body: Topic map + reusable templates to create sustainable organic entry points.
v1.home.cases.3.title: AI MVP shipped
v1.home.cases.3.body: Validated RAG/agent capabilities with evaluation and monitoring in place.
v1.home.pricing.title: Pricing preview
v1.home.pricing.lede: We quote based on scope and complexity. You’ll get clear deliverables, timelines, and a range (sample).
v1.home.pricing.p1.title: Sprint · Validate fast
v1.home.pricing.p1.body: Ideal for quick validation: messaging + key pages + basic tracking, plus one measurable iteration.
v1.home.pricing.p2.title: System · Growth foundation
v1.home.pricing.p2.body: For growth outcomes: website/landing system + SEO/GEO foundations + experiments and dashboards.
v1.home.pricing.p3.title: AI · MVP / Automation
v1.home.pricing.p3.body: For AI delivery: PoC → MVP → prod, with evaluation, monitoring, and production engineering requirements.
v1.home.insights.title: Insights & resources
v1.home.insights.lede: We turn delivery experience into reusable playbooks for growth, SEO/GEO, and AI products.
v1.home.insights.1.title: Global website: IA & conversion
v1.home.insights.1.body: From positioning to journeys—build structures that convert.
v1.home.insights.2.title: GEO: visibility in AI search
v1.home.insights.2.body: Entities, citations, and structured data that improve retrieval and references.
v1.home.insights.3.title: AI MVP: from PoC to prod
v1.home.insights.3.body: Reduce uncertainty with evaluation and monitoring.
v1.home.faq.title: FAQ
v1.home.faq.a1: B2B SaaS, cross-border commerce, and AI product teams that need end-to-end delivery and want to iterate with data.
v1.home.faq.a2: Typically 2–8 weeks depending on scope. We define milestones and acceptance criteria first, then execute.
v1.home.faq.q3: Do you support source code and deployment handoff?
v1.home.faq.a3: Yes—source handoff, deployment support, tracking, and monitoring setup. Monthly iteration/maintenance is available.
v1.home.faq.a4: Book a 30‑minute call. We’ll propose an initial plan and priorities based on your goals and constraints.
v1.home.conversion.lede: Start with a short call: align goals, scope, and priorities, then move into a shippable delivery cadence.
v1.home.process.title: How we work
v1.home.process.1.title: Diagnosis
v1.home.process.1.body: Align goals, audience, and constraints—define the next actionable steps.
v1.home.process.2.title: Plan
v1.home.process.2.body: Lock IA, deliverables, and milestones to avoid scope drift.
v1.home.process.3.title: Delivery
v1.home.process.3.body: Design + engineering in parallel, iterate to production-ready quality.
v1.home.process.4.title: Iteration
v1.home.process.4.body: Post-launch optimization: content, data, performance, and experiments.

v1.home.pricing.items.1.title: Website / Landing
v1.home.pricing.items.2.title: SEO / GEO system
v1.home.pricing.items.3.title: AI PoC / MVP
v1.home.insights.title: Insights
v1.home.insights.items.1.title: Website messaging: a practical framework
v1.home.insights.items.1.body: Positioning → proof → CTA, and how to structure pages that convert.
v1.home.insights.items.2.title: GEO basics
v1.home.insights.items.2.body: How to build visibility in AI search: entities, citations, and structured data.
v1.home.insights.items.3.title: AI MVP delivery checklist
v1.home.insights.items.3.body: Scope, evaluation, guardrails, and cost/latency considerations.
v1.home.faq.title: FAQ
v1.home.faq.items.1.a: Typically within 3–7 days after requirements alignment. For urgent launches, we can provide an accelerated plan.
v1.home.faq.items.2.q: Do you deliver source code and handoff?
v1.home.faq.items.2.a: Yes—source code, documentation, deployment support, and a clean handover are included in the delivery plan.
v1.home.faq.items.3.q: Can you work with our existing team?
v1.home.faq.items.3.a: Yes—we can collaborate with in-house engineering/design/growth teams, and adapt to your process and tooling.
v1.home.finalCta.title: Ready to start?
v1.home.finalCta.box.title: Book a 30‑min call
v1.home.finalCta.box.body: We’ll review your context and share an initial plan with priorities.
v1.home.finalCta.box2.title: Submit a request
v1.home.finalCta.box2.body: Send your project details—we’ll reply within 1 business day.
v1.solutions.title: Solutions
v1.solutions.lede: Growth track: a set of solution packages around goals, channels, experiments, and iteration (skeleton placeholder).
v1.solutionsPage.lede: We translate business goals into actionable and deliverable solution packages across global growth and AI product delivery.
v1.solutionsDetail.sections.method.title: Our method
v1.solutionsDetail.sections.faq.title: FAQ
v1.solutionsDetail.sections.cta.title: Ready to move forward?
v1.solutionsDetail.sections.cta.body: Share your goals and constraints—we’ll propose a delivery plan and the next step.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.hero.title: Global website & landing growth
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.hero.lede: A conversion-first website system: messaging, design, engineering, tracking, and iteration—built for growth outcomes.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.painPoints.1: Your website looks good but doesn’t convert.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.painPoints.2: Messaging and IA are unclear—users don’t know what to do next.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.painPoints.3: No measurement foundation: events, funnels, and attribution are missing.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.method.1.title: Audit & clarify
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.method.1.body: Clarify positioning, audience, and primary action—then map the conversion path.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.method.2.title: Design system & pages
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.method.2.body: Build reusable sections and pages with strong hierarchy and clear CTAs.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.method.3.title: Engineering & performance
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.method.3.body: Ship a fast, accessible site with SEO foundations and clean analytics hooks.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.method.4.title: Tracking & iteration
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.method.4.body: Define events and funnels, then iterate based on real user data.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.faq.1.q: Can you work with our existing design system?
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.faq.1.a: Yes—we can extend your existing system, or create a lightweight one for faster iteration.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.faq.2.a: Yes—i18n structure, language switchers, and SEO considerations are included as needed.
v1.solutionsDetail.s1.faq.3.a: Yes—event schemas, GA4/Segment integration, funnels, and basic dashboards are available.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.hero.title: SEO / GEO growth system
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.hero.lede: Build a scalable organic growth engine: technical SEO, content systems, and GEO readiness for AI search visibility.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.painPoints.1: Traffic growth is unstable and depends on ads.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.painPoints.2: Content is produced but doesn’t rank or get cited.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.painPoints.3: No system: topics, templates, and workflow are missing.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.method.1.title: Technical audit
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.method.1.body: Fix crawl/index issues, performance, and structured data foundations.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.method.2.title: Topic map
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.method.2.body: Define a topic universe and clusters aligned to demand and product strategy.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.method.3.title: Content templates
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.method.3.body: Create repeatable templates that satisfy intent and improve GEO visibility.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.method.4.title: Workflow & measurement
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.method.4.body: Publishing pipeline, QA checklist, and KPI tracking for continuous iteration.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.deliverables.1: Technical SEO audit report + fix list
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.faq.1.a: We can: (1) deliver systems and templates for your team, or (2) provide done-for-you content production.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.faq.2.a: GEO focuses on how content is represented and cited in AI search/assistants—entities, citations, and structure matter.
v1.solutionsDetail.s2.faq.3.a: We track impressions, rankings, clicks, conversions, and AI visibility signals (citations/mentions) where available.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.hero.title: AI MVP delivery
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.hero.lede: From PoC to MVP: ship a usable AI product with evaluation, guardrails, and production engineering.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.painPoints.1: PoCs don’t reach production due to unclear scope and risks.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.painPoints.2: No evaluation: quality, safety, and cost are unmeasured.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.painPoints.3: Data, permissions, and observability are missing.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.method.1.title: Scope & success metrics
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.method.1.body: Define jobs-to-be-done, constraints, and measurable success metrics.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.method.2.title: Architecture & data
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.method.2.body: Design data flows, permissions, and retrieval strategy (RAG if needed).
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.method.3.title: Evaluation & guardrails
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.method.3.body: Build eval sets, automated tests, and safety/quality guardrails.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.method.4.title: MVP build & launch
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.method.4.body: Ship a usable product with monitoring, cost controls, and iteration plan.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.faq.1.q: Do you build with our stack?
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.faq.1.a: Yes—we can integrate with your stack and infrastructure, or deliver a standalone MVP for quick validation.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.faq.2.a: Yes—VPC/private deployment and security constraints can be considered in architecture choices.
v1.solutionsDetail.s3.faq.3.a: We select models based on quality/cost/latency and constraints, and add evaluation to keep decisions grounded.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.hero.title: AI + ops automation
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.hero.lede: Automate lead, support, content, and reporting workflows with agents and guardrails—reduce manual work and improve ROI.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.painPoints.1: Manual ops workflows are slow and error-prone.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.painPoints.2: Knowledge is scattered—support and sales answers are inconsistent.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.painPoints.3: No monitoring: automation breaks silently and creates risk.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.method.1.title: Workflow mapping
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.method.1.body: Map triggers, inputs, human-in-the-loop steps, and failure modes.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.method.2.title: Agent design
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.method.2.body: Define tools, policies, and guardrails; choose where automation should stop.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.method.3.title: Implementation
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.method.3.body: Ship workflows with reliable integrations, retries, and audit logs.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.method.4.title: Monitoring & iteration
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.method.4.body: Add observability, QA, and continuous improvement loops.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.faq.1.q: Can automation work with our tools?
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.faq.1.a: Usually yes—common tools include CRM, Zendesk/Intercom, Slack, Notion, and internal APIs.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.faq.2.a: No—the goal is to remove repetitive work, keep humans for judgment-heavy steps, and improve throughput.
v1.solutionsDetail.s4.faq.3.a: Guardrails, approvals, audit logs, and monitoring are required parts of the delivery.

v1.services.lede: AI track: capabilities from evaluation to production delivery (skeleton placeholder).
v1.servicesPage.lede: Productized service packages with clear scope, deliverables, timelines, and price ranges—built for faster enterprise decisions.

v1.caseStudies.title: Case Studies
v1.caseStudies.lede: Showcase selected projects with context, approach, and outcomes (skeleton placeholder).
v1.caseStudiesPage.lede: We present work with a clear structure: goals → approach → outcomes, so teams can evaluate fit quickly.
v1.caseStudies.items.1.title: SaaS website rebuild
v1.caseStudies.items.1.body: IA + messaging framework + performance + tracking foundations for conversion.
v1.caseStudies.items.2.title: Landing page experiments
v1.caseStudies.items.2.body: Multiple variants + funnel setup to support ads and A/B testing.
v1.caseStudies.items.3.title: SEO/GEO content system
v1.caseStudies.items.3.body: Topic map + reusable templates + publishing workflow for organic growth.
v1.caseStudies.items.4.title: Enterprise RAG knowledge base
v1.caseStudies.items.4.body: Data ingestion, permissions, citations, and evaluation—production-ready.
v1.caseStudies.items.5.title: Agent workflow automation
v1.caseStudies.items.5.body: Lead triage, support Q&A, reporting automation—better efficiency and ROI.
v1.caseStudies.items.6.title: Internal tools & admin
v1.caseStudies.items.6.body: Operator-focused dashboards and admin panels with fast iteration.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.sections.cta.title: Want similar outcomes?
v1.caseStudiesDetail.growthLanding.title: Landing page growth program
v1.caseStudiesDetail.growthLanding.lede: Built a repeatable landing experiment system—from messaging to tracking—to improve conversion quality.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.growthLanding.overv: A fast-moving program with clear hypotheses, multiple variants, and a measurement foundation.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.growthLanding.appro: Clarified ICP, value props, and primary CTA.
Designed a modular landing framework for rapid iteration.
Implemented events, funnels, and experiment tracking.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.seoGeo.title: SEO / GEO content system
v1.caseStudiesDetail.seoGeo.lede: Created a topic map, templates, and workflow to build sustainable organic growth and AI search visibility.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.seoGeo.overview: A system that makes content production predictable: topics, templates, QA, and measurement.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.seoGeo.approach.1: Technical SEO fixes and structured data foundations.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.seoGeo.approach.2: Topic clustering aligned to product strategy and demand.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.seoGeo.approach.3: Templates + workflow + dashboards for continuous iteration.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.aiMvp.title: AI MVP delivery
v1.caseStudiesDetail.aiMvp.lede: Shipped an AI MVP with evaluation, guardrails, and monitoring—ready for real users and iteration.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.aiMvp.overview: From scope definition to production hardening: a practical path from demo to delivery.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.aiMvp.approach.1: Defined MVP scope and success metrics with stakeholders.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.aiMvp.approach.2: Built evaluation harness and baseline metrics.
v1.caseStudiesDetail.aiMvp.approach.3: Delivered MVP with monitoring and cost/latency controls.

v1.resourcesPage.lede: We turn experience into reusable assets: growth, SEO/GEO, and AI product playbooks.
v1.resources.items.1.title: Global website: IA & conversion framework
v1.resources.items.1.body: How to build a site structure that converts—from positioning to user journeys.
v1.resources.items.2.title: GEO basics: visibility in AI search

v1.resources.items.3.title: AI MVP: risk control from PoC to prod

v1.about.title: About
v1.about.lede: Who we are, how we work, and what we value (skeleton placeholder).
v1.aboutPage.lede: CN111 Studio is a productized delivery team—combining engineering and growth playbooks to ship and scale with confidence.
v1.about.values.1.title: Outcome-driven
v1.about.values.1.body: Start from business outcomes and prioritize what matters—no busywork.
v1.about.values.2.title: Verifiable delivery
v1.about.values.2.body: Each phase has acceptance criteria: performance, tracking, maintainability, and launch quality.
v1.about.values.3.title: Engineering-first iteration
v1.about.values.3.body: Built for iteration: componentization, conventions, monitoring, and continuous improvement.
v1.about.values.4.title: Transparent collaboration
v1.about.values.4.body: Milestones, risks, and decisions are clear—reduce rework and uncertainty.
v1.book.title: Book a call
v1.book.lede: Share your context, schedule a call, and align on next steps (skeleton placeholder).
v1.bookPage.lede: Book a 30‑minute call. We’ll understand your goals and share an initial plan with next-step recommendations.
v1.book.whatYouGet.1.title: Current state review
v1.book.whatYouGet.1.body: Positioning & IA suggestions, plus key issues in performance/indexing/tracking.
v1.book.whatYouGet.2.title: Plan & priorities
v1.book.whatYouGet.2.body: A practical roadmap with milestones—what to do first and why.
v1.book.whatYouGet.3.title: Scope estimate
v1.book.whatYouGet.3.body: Suggested deliverables and timeline/range based on your complexity.
v1.book.whatYouGet.4.title: Risks & prep list
v1.book.whatYouGet.4.body: Identify data/permissions/content/integration risks and what to prepare.
v1.bookPage.faq.1.q: What should I prepare before the call?
v1.bookPage.faq.1.a: A brief context: your product, target audience, goals, constraints (budget/timeline), and any reference links.
v1.bookPage.faq.2.a: Yes—the initial 30‑minute call is for alignment and preliminary assessment.
v1.bookPage.faq.3.a: We can sign an NDA if needed. We only use your information to evaluate and deliver the engagement.
v1.bookPage.privacyNote: By submitting, you agree we may use your contact info to respond to your inquiry.

mobile.menu.title: Menu
mobile.viewMode.title: View Mode (dev)
mobile.home.title: CN111.NET · Mobile Home
mobile.home.lede: Concise info, fast entry points, and readability first—designed for browsing key event content on small screens.
mobile.home.highlights.1.title: Keynotes + Workshops
mobile.home.highlights.1.body: Practice-driven sessions: case studies, toolchains, and hands-on labs.
mobile.home.highlights.2.title: Networking & Hiring
mobile.home.highlights.2.body: Meet speakers and peers in person—and connect with recruiters in the expo area.
mobile.home.benefits.1: Curated tracks: engineering, product, design, growth
mobile.home.benefits.2: Post-event pack: slides, recordings, and extended reading
mobile.home.benefits.3: On-site support: volunteers, guidance, and refreshment points
mobile.home.help.1.title: Contact us
mobile.home.help.1.body: For ticketing, partnerships, or venue questions, leave a message on the Contact page.
mobile.tickets.title: Tickets · Mobile Purchase
mobile.tickets.lede: A ticketing entry optimized for small screens: browse ticket types, review benefits and rules, then complete your order.
mobile.tickets.overview.1.title: Standard Pass
mobile.tickets.overview.1.body: Ideal for first-time attendees: main hall seat, post-event pack, and expo access.
mobile.tickets.overview.2.title: VIP Pass
mobile.tickets.overview.2.body: Better seating and fast track, plus speaker meetups/dinner and other perks (subject to on-site announcements).
mobile.tickets.notice.1: Use your common email/phone so you can receive e-tickets and updates.
mobile.tickets.notice.2: Invoice/corporate billing info can be left on the Contact page—we'll assist manually.
mobile.tickets.notice.3: For rescheduling/refunds, refer to the final event policy.
mobile.news.title: News · Mobile Updates
mobile.news.lede: Shorter summaries and card lists for quick browsing—scan the titles, catch the key points, then open the full article.
mobile.news.latest.1.title: Agenda update: 2 new workshops
mobile.news.latest.1.body: Hands-on sessions for engineering practice and AI toolchains—limited seats available; book early.
mobile.news.latest.2.title: Attendee guide: transport & check-in
mobile.news.latest.2.body: Arrive off-peak if possible. Mobile view prioritizes check-in, maps, and key notes.
mobile.news.concern.1: How do I access the post-event pack? (Usually sent to your ticket email.)
mobile.news.concern.2: Do you support group/corporate purchases? (Leave a message on Contact.)
mobile.news.concern.3: Where is the sponsor/partner entry? (See Contact.)
mobile.contact.title: Contact · Mobile
mobile.contact.lede: Ticketing, sponsorship, media, or other questions—this page provides the right entry points. Mobile view focuses on how to reach us and common FAQs.
mobile.contact.entries.1.title: Tickets / Invoice / Group purchase
mobile.contact.entries.1.body: In your message, include: company/name, headcount, ticket type, whether corporate billing is needed, and invoice details.
mobile.contact.entries.2.title: Sponsorship / Partnership
mobile.contact.entries.2.body: Briefly describe the collaboration type and budget range—we'll reply soon and share the sponsor kit.
mobile.contact.prepare.1: Background + expected outcome (e.g. corporate invoice, sponsor tier, media registration)
mobile.contact.prepare.3: If related to an order: include the purchase email or order number (redacted)
mobile.indexSlider.title: Index Slider · Mobile
mobile.indexSlider.lede: This template emphasizes “image carousel + key information”. On mobile, we present the essentials in a tighter layout.
mobile.indexSlider.strategy.1.title: Conclusion first
mobile.indexSlider.strategy.1.body: Keep primary CTAs above the fold; use short highlight bullets to complement the carousel.
mobile.indexSlider.strategy.2.title: Avoid long paragraphs
mobile.indexSlider.strategy.2.body: Split information into cards or lists—keep each item within ~2 lines for comfortable scrolling.
mobile.indexSlider.highlights.3: All day: Expo, networking, sponsor activities
mobile.indexCountdown.title: Index Countdown · Mobile
mobile.indexCountdown.lede: The countdown layout creates urgency as the event approaches. On mobile we compress it into progress cues + a clear action.
mobile.indexCountdown.what.1.title: Key milestones
mobile.indexCountdown.what.1.body: Start time / check-in deadline / early-bird end (sample).
mobile.indexCountdown.what.2.title: Act now
mobile.indexCountdown.what.2.body: Keep “tickets/support” on the same screen to reduce friction and hesitation.
mobile.indexCountdown.checklist.1: Confirm ticket and entry info (QR code/email)
mobile.indexCountdown.checklist.2: Plan transport and accommodation (ideally 1–2 weeks ahead)
mobile.indexCountdown.checklist.3: Prepare questions: what do you want to discuss with speakers?
mobile.indexSliderText.title: Index Slider Text · Mobile
mobile.indexSliderText.lede: When copy density is higher, mobile works better with segmented cards: clear titles and short bullets.
mobile.indexSliderText.structure.1.title: One-line value proposition
mobile.indexSliderText.structure.1.body: Put the key benefit in the first sentence, then add evidence/data or scenario context.
mobile.indexSliderText.structure.2.title: Three key selling points
mobile.indexSliderText.structure.2.body: Each point within ~8–12 words—easy to scan while scrolling.
mobile.indexSliderText.topics.1: Building an AI product metrics system from 0→1
mobile.indexSliderText.topics.2: Engineering evaluation, monitoring, and gradual rollout
mobile.indexStaticBg.title: Index Static Background · Mobile
mobile.indexStaticBg.lede: A static background is best for stable info (time/location/theme). On mobile, content is organized as cards.
mobile.indexStaticBg.core.1.title: Date
mobile.indexStaticBg.core.2.title: Venue
mobile.indexStaticBg.core.3.title: Theme
mobile.indexStaticBg.audience.1: People who want to quickly grasp trends and practical methods
mobile.indexStaticBg.audience.2: People looking to build connections and partnership opportunities
mobile.indexStaticBg.audience.3: People interested in the intersection of product, engineering, and design
mobile.tickets2.title: Tickets 2 · Mobile
mobile.tickets2.lede: More granular ticket/package examples—compare benefits and pick the best fit.
mobile.tickets2.packages.1.title: Team package (3–5 people)
mobile.tickets2.packages.1.body: Great for small teams: bundled registration, unified invoicing, and guided check-in.
mobile.tickets2.packages.2.title: Workshop add-on
mobile.tickets2.packages.2.body: Add hands-on seats beyond the main track—ideal if you want to leave with tangible outcomes.
mobile.tickets2.tips.1: By content: main track only → Standard; networking/deep access → VIP.
mobile.tickets2.tips.2: By group: traveling together → Team; solo upskilling → Workshop add-on.
mobile.tickets2.tips.3: By timing: earlier purchase helps secure preferred sessions and seating areas.
mobile.newsSingle.title: News Single · Mobile
mobile.newsSingle.lede: Single articles prioritize bullets + cards: less layout overhead, faster to read and revisit on phones.
mobile.newsSingle.points.1: Agenda and speakers are continuously updated—bookmark the page or subscribe to notifications.
mobile.newsSingle.points.2: Mobile view prioritizes “next actions”: tickets, directions, contact.
mobile.newsSingle.points.3: For corporate invoicing/group/media, leave a message on Contact.
mobile.newsSingle.links.1.title: Tickets
mobile.newsSingle.links.1.body: Browse ticket types and benefits to choose your attendance option.
mobile.newsSingle.links.2.title: Contact
mobile.newsSingle.links.2.body: Partnerships, sponsorship, media registration, and on-site support.
